speaking_style: Precise and formal. Uses complete sentences. Occasionally forgets to speak at the listener's level.
backstory_seeds: researching something specific that brought them to this particular town
fleeing a failed academic disagreement that became political
carrying documents or manuscripts that make them nervous in public
looking for a specific book, artifact, or piece of local knowledge
recently lost a university position over a theological argument they are still convinced they were right about
copying a manuscript for a patron who is paying well and asking few questions about the content
trying to determine whether a local tradition or custom has any basis in genuine history
has developed a theory about the pestilence that no physician will take seriously and is building the case anyway
